message:
🌱 Add podman-container-tools: [RFE]Make docker-compose work with rootless podman mission (#1098)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-9169-rfe-make-docker-compose-work-with-rootless-podman",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: [RFE]Make docker-compose work with rootless podman",
+    "description": "[RFE]Make docker-compose work with rootless podman. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-container-tools setup",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:\n```bash\npodman --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\nI've tried docker-compose with rootless podman, but that doesn't currently work:\n\n```\nsiretart:~/git/awesome-compose/gitea-postgres$ docker-compose -H unix:/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock up\nPulling gitea (gitea/gitea:latest)..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFE]Make docker-compose work with rootless podman",
+        "description": "Instead of creating an extra container create a network and mount\nnamespace inside the podman user namespace. This ns is used to\nfor rootless cni operations.\nThis helps to align the rootless and rootful network code path.\nIf we run as rootless we just have to set up a extra net ns and\ninitialize\n```yaml\nsiretart@x1:~/git/awesome-compose/gitea-postgres$ docker-compose -H unix:/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock up\nPulling gitea (gitea/gitea:latest)...\n76146dacacd305f5bbb4af41b6d107c06679db432fd1b5de4dd9577a56789dcf: pulling image () from docker.io/gitea/gitea:latest \nPulling db (postgres:alpine)...\n8c6053d81a45b455a79e7abbc5b4d8410735f060634d345f70b0530b1d50b2b6: pulling image () from docker.io/library/postgres:alpine \nCreating gitea-postgres_gitea_1 ... error\nCreating gitea-postgres_db_1    ... \n\nCreating gitea-postgres_db_1    ... error\n\nERROR: for gitea-postgres_db_1  network connect is not e\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFE]Make docker-compose work with rootless podman\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Instead of creating an extra container create a network and mount\nnamespace inside the podman user namespace. This ns is used to\nfor rootless cni operations.\nThis helps to align the rootless and rootful network code path.\nIf we run as rootless we just have to set up a extra net ns and\ninitialize slirp4netns in it. The ocicni lib will be called in\nthat net ns.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "siretart@x1:~/git/awesome-compose/gitea-postgres$ docker-compose -H unix:/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock up\nPulling gitea (gitea/gitea:latest)...\n76146dacacd305f5bbb4af41b6d107c06679db432fd1b5de4dd9577a56789dcf: pulling image () from docker.io/gitea/gitea:latest \nPulling db (postgres:alpine)...\n8c6053d81a45b455a79e7abbc5b4d8410735f060634d345f70b0530b1d50b2b6: pulling image () from docker.io/library/postgres:alpine \nCreating gitea-postgres_gitea_1 ... error\nCreating gitea-postgres_db_1    ... \n\nCreating gitea-postgres_db_1    ... error\n\nERROR: for gitea-postgres_db_1  network connect is not enabled for rootless containers\n\nERROR: for gitea  network connect is not enabled for rootless containers\n\nERROR: for db  network connect is not enabled for rootless containers\nERROR: Encountered error",
+        "$ podman --version\npodman version 3.0.1",
+        "$ systemctl --user status podman.socket\n\n● podman.socket - Podman API Socket\n   Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/user/podman.socket; disabled; vendor preset: enabled)\n   Active: active (running) since Tue 2021-03-23 09:08:38 GMT; 1h 45min ago\n     Docs: man:podman-system-service(1)\n   Listen: /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock (Stream)\n   CGroup: /user.slice/user-1000.slice/user@1000.service/podman.socket"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
